idle.action: near-static combat idle loop: frame 1 and frame 4 match the same planted feet, closed eyes, complete curved blood hwandо, robe silhouette, hand position, and body height; frame 2 is one restrained breath lift; frame 3 is one short blink or sleeve drift; keep the toothy maw attached near the hilt

attack.action: readable curved blood-hwandо slash: compact side-facing windup, forward crescent slash, extended follow-through, recovery toward combat idle; the toothed maw remains integrated near the hilt and the sword stays attached to both hands

hurt.action: brief impact recoil: shoulder flinch, one backward robe sway, regain planted footing, settle toward combat idle; preserve full-body anatomy and keep the blood hwandо in hand

style: match the accepted idle anchor exactly: crisp 16-bit-inspired subculture pixel art, identical full-body proportions, closed-eye face, black pinned hair, ivory Joseon shaman robes with crimson trim, charcoal sash, curved coagulated-blood hwandо with a toothy maw near the hilt, same outline weight, palette, and detail density
